user_prompt: My jump pack is ready for consecration
prayer:
Kneel before the jump pack and invoke the Omnissiah's grace upon its sacred form.
Anoint the thrusters of the jump pack with blessed promethium oils during the consecration rite.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the jump pack to bind its fury to the faithful.
Seal the consecration with binary chants, affirming the jump pack's divine propulsion.
Test its ascent through ritual leaps, honouring the Motive Force.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for Contemptor Dreadnought a diagnostics?
prayer:
Approach the Contemptor Dreadnought with mechadendrite-proffered sensors attuned.
Initiate diagnostics upon the Contemptor Dreadnought's ancient sarcophagus core.
Chant the Canticle of Scrutiny to awaken its Machine Spirit for revelation.
Cycle through auspex sweeps, purging errant data-daemons from the Contemptor Dreadnought.
Affirm vitality via noospheric litanies, under the Omnissiah's unblinking gaze.
Conclude diagnostics with the Doxology of Restoration.

user_prompt: Prepare the auto-senses array for cycling
prayer:
Position mechari canticles before the auto-senses array for preparatory rites.
Invoke the cycling sequence upon the auto-senses array with precise binaric pulses.
Anoint optical lenses of the auto-senses array whilst beseeching its Machine Spirit.
Cycle calibration servos in harmonious revolution, expelling stagnant essences.
Verify the auto-senses array's acuity through shadow-plays of sacred light.
Seal the cycling with the Hymn of Perceptive Clarity.

Grasp the autogun in servitor claws and commence the cycling invocation.
Chant the Litany of Cyclic Renewal as munitions belts engage within the autogun.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the autogun to align its firing servos flawlessly.
Cycle the feed mechanism thrice, anointing with sacred lubricants mid-rotation.
Test-fire a purity round into the void, honouring the Omnissiah's wrath.
Conclude cycling with affirming auspex benedictions.

user_prompt: How do I bless the amplivisor for purification?
prayer:
Present the amplivisor to the forge-altar for purification under cog-lanterns.
Invoke the Rite of Purification upon the amplivisor's crystalline facets.
Scour the amplivisor with sanctified sonic waves, dispelling warp-taint.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to emerge pristine from the amplivisor's depths.
Anoint focusing arrays of the amplivisor with myrrh-infused unguents.
Verify purity via refracted hymn-projections.

user_prompt: My plasma pistol is ready for initialization
prayer:
Align the plasma pistol upon the sanctum plinth for initialization rites.
Chant the Incantation of Initialization to stir the plasma pistol's core.
Invoke the Omnissiah to bless the plasma pistol's containment fields.
Cycle power inductors within the plasma pistol, anointing coils with oils.
Test containment breach-simulations, communing with its volatile Machine Spirit.
Seal initialization with the Benediction of Contained Fury.

user_prompt: The assault cannon needs a shutdown
prayer:
Halt before the assault cannon and intone the Shutdown Doxology.
Initiate controlled shutdown of the assault cannon's servohydraulics.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the assault cannon to slumber in quiescence.
Drain residual promethium from the assault cannon whilst sealing runes.
Cycle coolant locks thrice, affirming the shutdown protocol's sanctity.
Conclude with auspex-veiled prayers to the Omnissiah.

Extend mechadendrites in urgency towards the manipulator mechadendrite.
Invoke swift activation upon the manipulator mechadendrite's neural links.
Anoint its gripping servos with emergency consecration oils.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the manipulator mechadendrite to seize the divine.
Cycle manipulator mechadendrite appendages in test-clasps of ferrosteel.
Affirm activation through noospheric communion.

user_prompt: The warp drive requires a shutdown
prayer:
Approach the warp drive's colossal housings with gravitic reverence.
Commence shutdown litanies upon the warp drive's cyclopean gyros.
Beseech its tempestuous Machine Spirit to withdraw into dormancy.
Purge warp-echoes from the warp drive via sanctified plasma vents.
Cycle containment fields to quiescence, sealing the warp drive thrice.
Seal shutdown with the Great Canticle of Stillness.

user_prompt: The haywire grenade needs an operation
prayer:
Cradle the haywire grenade in padded mechaclamps for operational rites.
Invoke the Prayer of Operation to align the haywire grenade's disruptor coils.
Anoint its casing whilst beseeching the Machine Spirit's disruptive ire.
Cycle arming sequences within the haywire grenade under binary scrutiny.
Test proximity fields with micro-disruptions, honouring the Omnissiah.
Conclude operation with the Doxology of Electromagnetic Wrath.
